name: Lucille Hegamin
abstract: Lucille Nelson Hegamin (November 29, 1894 – March 1, 1970) was an American singer and entertainer and an early African-American blues recording artist.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: That's his wife. / Oh, Lucille was...she made records like right along with Mamie Smith.

about_quotes.speaker: Sam Wooding
about_quotes.evidence: And when we had singers on the scene, like Ma Rainey, and Lucille Hegamin.

about_quotes.speaker: Happy Caldwell
about_quotes.evidence: First time I saw Garvin Bushell, he came to Chicago with Lucille Hegamin.
